step_rationale: P-selectin+ microparticles mark platelet activation and platelet–leukocyte interaction; predict cardiovascular events.
mechanism: P-selectin+ microparticles are released during platelet activation and mediate leukocyte adhesion at sites of arterial injury.

references.title: Microparticles during long-term follow-up after acute myocardial infarction. Association to atherosclerotic burden and risk of cardiovascular events.
